{{Quote|And here are the cells, Master Skywalker, containing fifty of the Republic's most dangerous criminals… on their way to ''ultimate incarceration'' on M'Bardi.|[[Unidentified Republic Navy captain|A Republic Navy captain]], to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|<ref name="Out">{{TCWComicCite|6.30|Out}}</ref>}}
'''M'Bardi''' was a [[Water/Legends|water]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Kalamith sector/Legends|Kalamith sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was also the site of the [[M'Bardi Prison]].<ref name="Means and Ends" />

{{Planet-stub}}
